programme.title: Indian Alexandrite Gems

programme.title: Gravitas
programme.desc: The host provides a concise overview and in-depth analysis of social, political and economic news stories from around the world.

programme.title: Gravitas
programme.desc: The host provides a concise overview and in-depth analysis of social, political and economic news stories from around the world.

programme.title: Wion Pulse
programme.desc: The host shares a detailed analysis of the latest news stories from various spheres including political and socio-economic issues from across the globe.

programme.title: Gravitas

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/6. Deciding to team up and put a stop to the evil, the siblings uncover a disturbing family secret. 2024. Germany. Director: Christian Alvart. Starring: Julius Gause, Lucas Gregorowicz.

programme.title: The Man Between
programme.desc: In post WWII Berlin, the sister of a British officer must be rescued by a German smuggler. 1953. UK. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: James Mason, Claire Bloom.

programme.title: Margrete, Queen Of The North
programme.desc: Queen Margrete rules most of Scandinavia, but a wild conspiracy puts her monarchy at risk. 2021. Denmark. Director: Charlotte Sieling. Starring: Trine Dyrholm, Soren Malling.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/6. Deciding to team up and put a stop to the evil, the siblings uncover a disturbing family secret. 2024. Germany. Director: Christian Alvart. Starring: Julius Gause, Lucas Gregorowicz.

programme.title: The President's Wife
programme.desc: Bernadette Chirac, gets revenge on her husband and President by becoming a prominent media person. 2023. France. Director: Lea Domenach. Starring: Catherine Deneuve, Denis Podalydes.

programme.title: Chaplin's Modern Times: The Path of Silence.
programme.desc: The end of the 'silent film' era turned Charlie Chaplin's world on his head, follow his rebelion against modern cinema. 2024. France. Director: Gregory Monro.

programme.title: The Army Game
programme.desc: Jean must win the respect of his fellow soldiers, and the Colonel's daughter. 1961. France. Directors: Claude de Givray, Francois Truffaut. Starring: Christian de Tilliere, Ricet Barrier.

programme.title: The Food Club: Home Again
programme.desc: We reunite with three life-long friends, food, friendship and new challenges await. 2025. Denmark. Director: Charlotte Sachs Bostrup. Staring: Rasmus Botoft, Helle Dolleris.

programme.title: Goodbye Julia
programme.desc: After covering up a murder, a retired Northern-Sudanese singer, Mona, tries to make ammends. 2023. Sudan, France. Director: Mohamed Kordofani. Starring: Eiman Yousif, Siran Riak, Nazar Goma.

programme.title: Elvira
programme.desc: 1/1. Elvira works as a receptionist at a brothel. When a prostitute goes missing, Elvira feels an urge to investigate. 2022. Denmark. Director: Heidi Maria Faisst. Starring: Sara Klein Larsen.

programme.title: Elvira
programme.desc: 1/2. While babysitting Candy's son, Elvira ventures into unfamiliar territory. 2022. Denmark. Directors: Heidi Maria Faisst, Oliver Ussing. Starring: Sara Klein Larsen.

programme.title: The President's Wife
programme.desc: Bernadette Chirac, gets revenge on her husband and President by becoming a prominent media person. 2023. France. Director: Lea Domenach. Starring: Catherine Deneuve, Denis Podalydes.

programme.title: The Food Club: Home Again
programme.desc: We reunite with three life-long friends, food, friendship and new challenges await. 2025. Denmark. Director: Charlotte Sachs Bostrup. Staring: Rasmus Botoft, Helle Dolleris.

programme.title: Goodbye Julia
programme.desc: After covering up a murder, a retired Northern-Sudanese singer, Mona, tries to make ammends. 2023. Sudan, France. Director: Mohamed Kordofani. Starring: Eiman Yousif, Siran Riak, Nazar Goma.

programme.title: The Army Game
programme.desc: Jean must win the respect of his fellow soldiers, and the Colonel's daughter. 1961. France. Directors: Claude de Givray, Francois Truffaut. Starring: Christian de Tilliere, Ricet Barrier.

programme.title: The President's Wife
programme.desc: Bernadette Chirac, gets revenge on her husband and President by becoming a prominent media person. 2023. France. Director: Lea Domenach. Starring: Catherine Deneuve, Denis Podalydes.

programme.title: The Food Club: Home Again
programme.desc: We reunite with three life-long friends, food, friendship and new challenges await. 2025. Denmark. Director: Charlotte Sachs Bostrup. Staring: Rasmus Botoft, Helle Dolleris.

programme.title: Goodbye Julia
programme.desc: After covering up a murder, a retired Northern-Sudanese singer, Mona, tries to make ammends. 2023. Sudan, France. Director: Mohamed Kordofani. Starring: Eiman Yousif, Siran Riak, Nazar Goma.

programme.title: Alien: Terror In Space
programme.desc: From the outermost reaches of space, to the comfort of your lounge, learn what made the cinema classic 'Alien' so successful. 2025. France. Directors: Anne Cutaia, Sophie Peyrard.

programme.title: Ad Astra
programme.desc: One man follows in his fathers footsteps to mission across the universe to investigate a mysterious phenomenon. 2019. USA, China. Director: James Gray. Starring: Brad Pitt, Tommy Lee Jones.

programme.title: Andamooka
programme.desc: As her 30th approaches, a girl leaves the city to spend the birthday with her best friend. 2025. Australia. Directors: Danni Ogilvie, Mara Jean Quinn. Starring: Mara Jean Quinn, Georgina Neave.

programme.title: Meet The Buchanans
programme.desc: Enthusiasts from around the world join the Clan Buchanan for the inauguration of their new chief, Mike Buchanan. 2025. UK. Directors: Jack Cocker, Darren Hercher, Barbara Orton.

programme.title: Greatest Days
programme.desc: Five friends relive their teenage golden days at their favourite boy-band's show. 2023. UK, Greece. Director: Coky Giedroyc. Starring: Aisling Bea, Jayde Adams.

programme.title: Sid And Nancy
programme.desc: A dramatic re-enactment of the relationship between Sid Vicious of the sex pistols and his girlfriend Nancy Spungen. 1986. UK. Director: Alex Cox. Starring: Gary Oldman, Chloe Webb.

programme.title: Elvira
programme.desc: 1/3. In her quest to find Candy, Elvira devises a daring scheme. 2022. Denmark. Directors: Heidi Maria Faisst, Oliver Ussing. Starring: Sara Klein Larsen.

programme.title: Elvira
programme.desc: 1/4. Sun has been sent over to Zora, but Elvira realises he may be in danger. 2022. Denmark. Director: Samanou Acheche Sahlstrom. Starring: Sara Klein Larsen.

programme.title: Emilia Perez
programme.desc: Cartel leader Emilia Perez fakes her death so she can finally live as her true self. 2024. France, Mexico. Director: Jacques Audiard. Starring: Zoe Saldana, Karla Sofia Gascon, Selena Gomez.

programme.title: Alien: Terror In Space
programme.desc: From the outermost reaches of space, to the comfort of your lounge, learn what made the cinema classic 'Alien' so successful. 2025. France. Directors: Anne Cutaia, Sophie Peyrard.

programme.title: Ad Astra
programme.desc: One man follows in his fathers footsteps to mission across the universe to investigate a mysterious phenomenon. 2019. USA, China. Director: James Gray. Starring: Brad Pitt, Tommy Lee Jones.

programme.title: Andamooka
programme.desc: As her 30th approaches, a girl leaves the city to spend the birthday with her best friend. 2025. Australia. Directors: Danni Ogilvie, Mara Jean Quinn. Starring: Mara Jean Quinn, Georgina Neave.

programme.title: Greatest Days
programme.desc: Five friends relive their teenage golden days at their favourite boy-band's show. 2023. UK, Greece. Director: Coky Giedroyc. Starring: Aisling Bea, Jayde Adams.

programme.title: Alien: Terror In Space
programme.desc: From the outermost reaches of space, to the comfort of your lounge, learn what made the cinema classic 'Alien' so successful. 2025. France. Directors: Anne Cutaia, Sophie Peyrard.

programme.title: Emilia Perez
programme.desc: Cartel leader Emilia Perez fakes her death so she can finally live as her true self. 2024. France, Mexico. Director: Jacques Audiard. Starring: Zoe Saldana, Karla Sofia Gascon, Selena Gomez.

programme.title: Ad Astra
programme.desc: One man follows in his fathers footsteps to mission across the universe to investigate a mysterious phenomenon. 2019. USA, China. Director: James Gray. Starring: Brad Pitt, Tommy Lee Jones.

programme.title: The Third Man
programme.desc: Learning of a 'third man' present at the time of his friend's death, Martins investigates his conspiracy theory. 1949. UK, USA. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: Orson Welles, Joseph Cotten.

programme.title: Tigerland
programme.desc: Forced to become a soldier, one man struggles to remain human in the face of the Vietnam war. 2000. Germany, USA. Director: Joel Schumacher. Starring: Colin Farrell, Matthew Davis.

programme.title: Between The Temples
programme.desc: A greif-stricken cantor is in a crisis of faith when his grade-school music teacher re-enters his life. 2024. USA. Director: Nathan Silver. Starring: Jason Schwartzman, Carol Kane.

programme.title: Poison
programme.desc: After years apart, a couple is reunited, but their passionate reunion reignites long forgotten memories. 2024. Netherlands. Director: Desiree Nosbusch. Starring: Tim Roth, Trine Dyrholm.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 1/1. Marie Antoinette is just a teenager when she's forced to leave Austria to marry the Dauphin of France. 2022. France. Director: Pete Travis. Starring: Emilia Schule, James Purefoy.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 1/2. When Louis refuses to share his bed with her, Marie realises that producing an heir will not be straightforward. 2022. France. Director: Pete Travis. Starring: Emilia Schule.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 1/3. The royal family holidays at Fontainebleau, an escape from stifling Versailles. 2022. France. Director: Pete Travis. Starring: Emilia Schule, James Purefoy.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 1/4. The king collapses, and on recovery, decides to grant du Barry status at court - as his queen. 2022. France. Director: Pete Travis. Starring: Emilia Schule, James Purefoy.

programme.title: Between The Temples
programme.desc: A greif-stricken cantor is in a crisis of faith when his grade-school music teacher re-enters his life. 2024. USA. Director: Nathan Silver. Starring: Jason Schwartzman, Carol Kane.

programme.title: Tigerland
programme.desc: Forced to become a soldier, one man struggles to remain human in the face of the Vietnam war. 2000. Germany, USA. Director: Joel Schumacher. Starring: Colin Farrell, Matthew Davis.

programme.title: Show Home
programme.desc: Explore the failures of the human condition, sometimes you must go down before you can go back up. 2023. NZ. Director: Jane Shearer. Starring: Miriama McDowell, Kip Chapman.

programme.title: The Third Man
programme.desc: Learning of a 'third man' present at the time of his friend's death, Martins investigates his conspiracy theory. 1949. UK, USA. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: Orson Welles, Joseph Cotten.

programme.title: Poison
programme.desc: After years apart, a couple is reunited, but their passionate reunion reignites long forgotten memories. 2024. Netherlands. Director: Desiree Nosbusch. Starring: Tim Roth, Trine Dyrholm.

programme.title: Tigerland
programme.desc: Forced to become a soldier, one man struggles to remain human in the face of the Vietnam war. 2000. Germany, USA. Director: Joel Schumacher. Starring: Colin Farrell, Matthew Davis.

programme.title: Between The Temples
programme.desc: A greif-stricken cantor is in a crisis of faith when his grade-school music teacher re-enters his life. 2024. USA. Director: Nathan Silver. Starring: Jason Schwartzman, Carol Kane.

programme.title: The Dead Don't Hurt
programme.desc: During the American civil war, two lovers fight for their lives on the american frontier. 2023. USA. Director: Viggo Mortensen. Starring: Vicky Krieps, Viggo Mortensen, Solly McLeod.

programme.title: The Fallen Idol
programme.desc: While spying on a butler's affair, a boy becomes the sole witness to the death of the butler's wife. 1948. UK. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: Ralph Richardson, Michele Morgan.

programme.title: The Accidental Getaway Driver
programme.desc: Long accepts a last-minute call for a cab ride, the passengers take Long hostage at gunpoint. 2023. USA. Director: Sing J. Lee. Starring: Hiep Tran Nghia, Dustin Nguyen.

programme.title: Last Call
programme.desc: A desperate fugitive takes a family hostage with a live grenade at the turn of the millennium. 2026. Greece. Director: Sherif Francis. Starring: Orfeas Avgoustidis, Maria Nafpliotou.

programme.title: The Revenant
programme.desc: Left for dead, Hugh must use his only weapon to survive in a winter hellscape, his wit. 2015. USA, Hong Kong. Director: Alejandro Gonzalez Inarritu. Starring: Leonardo DiCaprio, Tom Hardy.
